meta.title: Venus Model Studio — Hybrid Studio of AI & Real Models
meta.description: Real talent, digital possibility. A new production studio where AI models and real models create together.

hero.taglineSecondary: AI Models × Real Models × Cinematic Production
hero.videoAlt: Two models representing real talent and digital possibility in a luxury studio

manifesto.l3: We unite the presence of real models
manifesto.l4: with the creative freedom of AI — in one studio.

aiModels.title: Fictional. Yet utterly convincing.
aiModels.body: Fully original AI models — never modeled on real people. Faces and presence designed for your brand.

realTalent.title: Set energy cannot be generated.
realTalent.body: The strobe flash, the charged air, the accidental perfect moment. Real photography is our origin.

meridian.title: Move the line yourself.
meridian.body: The same person — from a real shoot into digital expression. AI is expansion, not replacement.

footer.note: AI models and real models are clearly distinguished on every page.

servicesPage.title: What we do
servicesPage.intro: From AI model production to real-model photography and the hybrid work that unites them — we design the roles of people and AI around your brand's goals.

projectsPage.title: Selected work
projectsPage.intro: What's published now are self-initiated concept projects. We never present fabricated client names, awards, or press mentions as real.
projectsPage.empty: Projects are being prepared for release.

forTalentsPage.title: For models & talents
forTalentsPage.intro: We welcome real models, actors, aspiring talents and international models. We think through how your likeness is handled in the AI era, together with you.
benefits: Consistent creation from studio shoots to film and AI expression
Work only within a clearly agreed scope of likeness usage
Branding opportunities that open doors at home and abroad
forTalentsPage.rights: If your likeness is used for AI expression, we always agree the scope in advance. We never use it without consent or for the purpose of replacement, and publish only within the approved scope.
flow: AI expression and extension within consent
Final review of what goes public

aboutPage.title: Uniting real talent with digital possibility.
aboutPage.lead: Venus Model Studio is neither an anonymous AI generation shop nor a traditional model-agency directory. We are a studio that integrates real talent, photographic craft, AI expression and film production.
aboutPage.position: We work with both AI models and real models, and always distinguish them clearly. We see AI not as a replacement for people but as a tool that widens what's possible in expression.
principles: Clearly distinguish AI models, real models and AI-enhanced real talent in visuals and words
Never fabricate client names, awards or press mentions
Use a real person's likeness only within the scope they have consented to

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.intro: Whether you're a brand or producer, or a model or talent, you can reach us here.
contactPage.consentLabel: I agree to the privacy policy
contactPage.mailtoNote: Pressing send will open your email application.
contactPage.success: Your enquiry has been received. We'll be in touch shortly.
contactPage.error: Please try again later, or contact us directly by email.

errors.name: Please enter your name
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address
errors.message: Please enter a message (10 characters or more)
errors.consent: Consent to the privacy policy is required

legal.privacyBody: Personal information collected through this site's contact form is used solely to respond to your enquiry and is never shared with third parties without your consent. If you would like the information we hold deleted, please contact us. Where analytics are used, they are handled statistically and do not identify individuals.
legal.termsBody: Copyright in the images, video and text on this site belongs to Venus Model Studio or the rightful rights holders. All AI models are fictional and do not represent real people. The likeness of real models is published only within the scope they have consented to. Content may change without notice.
